name: com.synaplan/synaplan
title: Synaplan
description: Connect AI clients to a Synaplan workspace: semantic search over your documents (RAG) and your stored memories, exposed as MCP tools. Authenticated with a Synaplan API key.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Synaplan API key. Create one under Settings → API Keys at https://web.synaplan.com.
